The contact owns a 2021 Kia Stinger. The contact stated while driving at an undisclosed speed and making a turn, the vehicle lost motive power inadvertently. There was no warning light illuminated. The contact was able to restart the vehicle and drove to his nearby residence. The

narrative.headline: What 2021 Kia Stinger owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 17 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Service Brakes (35% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
